Products

Inertial Navigation Systems

High-precision FOG and MEMS-based INS/GNSS integrated navigation solutions for aerospace, marine, and autonomous vehicle applications.

FOG INSLKF-FS300

Fiber Optical Integrated Navigation System

Tactical-grade FOG-based GNSS/INS with self-alignment and RTK navigation for aircraft, ships, and UAVs.

Size: 21.2×15.5×12.5 cm
Aircraft NavigationUAV/Vehicle/ShipAttitude Reference
Request Datasheet
North SeekerLKF-MG300K

Microminiature MEMS North Seeker

Six-axis MEMS inertial sensor combo for north-seeking, navigation and attitude control. Full temperature compensation (-45°C to +80°C), 4KHz high-speed sampling, vibration-resistant sealed design.

Size: 4.7×4.7×3.15 cm
North SeekingDrilling SystemsVehicle/Vessel AttitudeSatcom on-the-Move
Request Datasheet
MEMS IMULKF-MG204B

Medium Precision MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit

Six-axis MEMS inertial attitude system with full-temperature calibration. In-situ replacement for STIM300. 1KHz sampling, sealed design for harsh environments. High-performance gyro + accelerometer integration.

Size: 4.48×3.86×2.15 cm
UAV Attitude ReferenceMobile MappingMissile Flight ControlRadar Stabilization
Request Datasheet
